target.name: ucdp_organized_violence_match
target.definition: 1 when the GDELT event matches a lethal UCDP organized-violence event within +/-3 days and 300 km, or is human-labeled important.
target.labelSource: UCDP GED + Candidate + source-checked Phase 1 human labels.

training.command: bun run labels:build && bun run train:full

limitations: Pure-TypeScript gradient-boosted trees approximate a LightGBM/XGBoost-class learner without native build dependencies.
Training labels mix UCDP organized-violence matches with human importance judgments.
UCDP covers organized lethal violence only; other signal types are out of scope.
